channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Jobless Father in Hluhluwe Sells Car and Cow to Fund Wedding
item.description: In Hluhluwe, northern KwaZulu-Natal, Mphakamise Nxumalo, a 42-year-old father of ten, recently married Ayanda Mdluli after selling his car and a cow to cover the wedding expenses. Nxumalo lost his job...

item.title: UKZN graduate celebrated for modest attire and touching moment with mother
item.description: At the University of KwaZulu-Natal’s recent graduation ceremony, 24-year-old Nokuthula Dlamini captured widespread attention for attending in a modest outfit rather than a new or 'classy' dress. Raise...

item.title: Nigeria’s New Ambassador to China Pledges Economic Boost for Kano
item.description: Nigeria don appoint Abdurrahman Bello Dambazau as ambassador go China, and e don promise say him go put Kano and Nigeria first for him new role. During him welcome reception for Kano, Dambazau talk sa...

item.title: Eric Rohman: The Swedish Poster Artist Who Defined a Century of Film Design
item.description: Eric Rohman, born in Nyköping, Sweden in 1891, became one of the few artists in the early 20th century to make a full-time living exclusively from creating posters. Over his prolific career, he produc...

item.title: Recreational Fishing in the US Represents a Major Source of Fish and Protein
item.description: New research reveals that recreational freshwater fishing in the United States captures significantly more fish than previously recorded. Scientists from the U.S. Geological Survey, the University of ...

item.title: Ontario Expands Transit Constables' Powers to Address Drug Use on Public Transit
item.description: Ontario's Progressive Conservative government has announced new powers for public transit special constables, allowing them to arrest or ticket individuals using illegal substances on transit and in t...

item.title: Senator Lacson Urges Preliminary Probe Into Top Officials Linked to Flood Control Scandal
item.description: Senator Panfilo Lacson has expressed the need for a preliminary investigation involving several high-profile officials, namely Martin Romualdez, Francis Escudero, Elpidio Villanueva, and Joseph Estrad...

item.title: Rudiger and Carreras Resolve Dressing Room Disagreement at Real Madrid
item.description: Real Madrid defender Antonio Rudiger don apologise to him teammate Alvaro Carreras after small wahala wey happen for dressing room following their 1-1 draw with Real Betis. E get as Daily Mail report ...

item.title: WA Government Raises First Home Buyer Stamp Duty Exemption Amid Rising Perth Property Prices
item.description: The Western Australian government has announced an increase in first home buyer stamp duty exemptions as the median house price in Perth surpasses $1 million. The exemption threshold has been lifted f...

item.title: Rihanna and Asap Rocky Spotted in Serious Conversation After Met Gala
item.description: Rihanna na ASAP Rocky walivutia macho baada ya kuonekana wakizungumza kwa hali ya mvutano baada ya Met Gala ya 2026. Wapenzi hawa, ambao wanajulikana kwa kuingia kwa mtindo mkubwa kwenye matukio, wali...

item.title: Senior Lawyer Taken into Custody Over Alleged Sexual Assault of Minor in Madhya Pradesh
item.description: In Madhya Pradesh, authorities have arrested a 75-year-old lawyer on allegations of sexually assaulting a minor. The police acted following a formal complaint filed by the victim's family, leading to ...

item.title: Road Negligence Causes Nearly 1.81 Lakh Deaths in India in 2024, NCRB Reports
item.description: According to the latest 'Crime in India' report by the National Crime Records Bureau (NCRB), careless and irresponsible driving led to the deaths of 495 people daily on Indian roads in 2024, amounting...

item.title: Canadian man sentenced for role in U.S. grandparent scam targeting elderly victims
item.description: A 44-year-old Canadian, Stefano Zanetti, has been sentenced to over 15 years in a U.S. prison for his involvement in a multi-million-dollar grandparent scam targeting elderly Americans. Zanetti was ar...

item.title: Leviste denies Recto’s claims, calls them unfounded
item.description: Naglabas ng pahayag si Leandro Leviste bilang tugon sa umano’y mga sinabi ni Ralph Recto, kung saan mariin niyang itinanggi ang mga alegasyon laban sa kanya at tinawag ang mga ito na walang basehan. A...

item.title: PSG Secures Spot Against Arsenal In Champions League Final
item.description: Paris Saint-Germain don waka enter Champions League final after dem manage hold Bayern Munich to 1-1 draw, wey make dem win 6-4 on aggregate. The action happen for Bavaria as PSG score early through O...

item.title: Indian Startup Pronto Raises $20 Million from Lachy Groom After Brief Meeting
item.description: In a rapid turn of events, Indian on-demand home services startup Pronto secured a $20 million investment from prominent Silicon Valley solo investor Lachy Groom after only a 20-minute meeting with fo...

item.title: Australian Woman in Bali in Critical Condition After Accidental Fall
item.description: A 29-year-old Australian woman, Luca Loveday, is in a critical condition in a Bali intensive care unit after a severe accident during a holiday with a friend. Luca collapsed suddenly while standing in...

item.title: Debate grows in the UK over restricting glyphosate use before harvest amid health and environmental concerns
item.description: Campaigners in the UK are urging the government to ban the use of glyphosate as a pre-harvest drying agent, citing concerns about potential risks to human health. Glyphosate, a widely used herbicide, ...

item.title: Patient incident in Canberra Hospital's behavioural unit raises safety concerns
item.description: In Canberra, a patient was initially charged with strangling a nurse in the behavioural assessment unit of the local hospital's emergency department. The charges, which included choking and assault ca...

item.title: Dignitaries Celebrate 60th Birthday of Mrs Boma Ogan in Okrika
item.description: The 60th birthday anniversary of Mrs Boma Ogan, eldest daughter of former Rivers State Governor Chief Rufus Ada George, was a grand event that attracted notable figures from across Nigeria. Former Gom...
